title: RSA Encryption & Decryption Flow with Blum Blum Shub
description: This flowchart illustrates how the Blum Blum Shub pseudorandom number generator is used to generate keys for the RSA public-key cryptosystem and how data is encrypted and decrypted.
elements: Generate two large prime numbers (p, q) using BBS
Compute n = p * q and φ(n) = (p-1)(q-1)
Choose public exponent e (coprime to φ(n))
Compute private exponent d (e * d ≡ 1 mod φ(n))
relationships: BBS primes feed into key generation
Public key is used for encryption
Private key is used for decryption
Encryption process transforms M to C
Decryption process transforms C back to M'
